LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Butchering.label: inspired butchering
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Butchering.beginLetter: [PAWN_pronoun] will produce higher quality cuts of meat and stronger leather for the next 4 days.
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Chemistry.label: inspired chemistry
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Chemistry.beginLetter: [PAWN_pronoun] will produce higher quality drugs and medicines for the next 4 days.
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Construction.label: inspired construction
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Construction.beginLetter: [PAWN_pronoun] will construct higher quality buildings and work tables for the next 4 days.
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Cooking.label: inspired cooking
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Cooking.beginLetter: [PAWN_pronoun] will produce better meals for the next 4 days.
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Gathering.label: inspired gathering
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Gathering.beginLetter: [PAWN_pronoun] will gather higher quality animal products and shear better wool for the next 4 days.
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Harvesting.label: inspired harvesting
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Harvesting.beginLetter: [PAWN_pronoun] will harvest higher quality crops for the next 4 days.
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Mining.label: inspired mining
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Mining.beginLetter: [PAWN_pronoun] will mine higher quality ores for the next 4 days.
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Stonecutting.label: inspired stonecutting
LanguageData.QF_Inspired_Stonecutting.beginLetter: [PAWN_pronoun] will cut higher quality stone blocks for the next 4 days.
